    "title": "Feb 08 | \u2705 \ud83d\udccc \ud83c\udfd7\ufe0f Hybrid Persona Switching Build",
    "summary": "Diagnosed why persona switching was failing (LLMs do not naturally self-interrupt for metacognitive tool calls), designed a hybrid solution through Level Upper analysis, and built it: 4 hard-switch rules (Debugger, Writer, Strategist, Builder) that mechanically force set_active_persona(), plus 2 methodology injection rules (Researcher, Teacher) that load frameworks without switching. Updated routing contract (Section 11), fixed stale Operator IDs in router scripts, and updated Operator persona doc.",
    "completed_at": "2026-02-09T09:14:46.571530",
    "decisions": [
        "Hard-switch for personas where cognitive stance genuinely differs (Debugger, Writer, Strategist, Builder); methodology injection for technique-only personas (Researcher, Teacher)",
        "Not a Pulse build - sequential dependencies and small scope made in-thread execution more efficient",
        "Informed by Aaron Mak conversation insight: explicit routing >> implicit semantic routing"
    ],
    "next_steps": [
        "Monitor over next 2 weeks - verify hard-switch rules actually fire when triggered",
        "If rules still do not fire, escalate to fundamentally different approach (the 30 percent uncertainty case)"
    ]
}
